title: fix: update system block parsing logic
Unable to update System Block on SRT512
body:
Hello there,

We encountered a bug when writing a system block on a (simulated) SRT512.

Running this simple example:

```kotlin
@Test
    fun `Basic read`() {
        val cardJson = getCardResourceAsString("srt512_prod_pid11h.json")
        val cardReader = plugContactlessReader()
        val srt = KSmITEStubSRT512(cardJson)
        cardReader.inject(srt)
        val smartCardService = SmartCardServiceProvider.getService()
        val basicSelector = smartCardService.readerApiFactory.createBasicCardSelector()

        val selectionExtension = StorageCardExtensionService
            .getInstance()
            .storageCardApiFactory
            .createStorageCardSelectionExtension(ProductType.ST25_SRT512)

        val manager = smartCardService.readerApiFactory.createCardSelectionManager()
        manager.prepareSelection(basicSelector, selectionExtension)
        val result = manager.processCardSelectionScenario(cardReader.reader)

        val smartcard = result.activeSmartCard as StorageCard

        println("UID : ${HexUtil.toHex(smartcard.uid)}")

        val transactionManager = StorageCardExtensionService
            .getInstance()
            .storageCardApiFactory
            .createStorageCardTransactionManager(cardReader.reader, smartcard)
            .prepareSt25WriteSystemBlock("00000000".toBlock().toByteArray())

        transactionManager.processCommands(ChannelControl.KEEP_OPEN)

        smartcard.systemBlock?.let { println("System block : ${HexUtil.toHex(it)}") }

        smartcard.getBlocks(0, 15).forEachIndexed(
            { i, block -> println("block $i : ${HexUtil.toHex(block)}") }
        )
    }
```

Yields the following stacktrace

```
Index 255 out of bounds for length 16
java.lang.ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException: Index 255 out of bounds for length 16
	at org.calypsonet.keyple.card.storagecard.StorageCardAdapter.setBlock(StorageCardAdapter.java:154)

	at com.billettiqueservices.sessionlayer.SessionLayerTests.Basic read(SessionLayerTests.kt:768)
```

We think [this line](https://github.com/calypsonet-member/keyple-card-cna-storagecard-java-lib/blob/b1149ee0a1fe81feb7dec229118c00b1ff9249ff/src/main/java/org/calypsonet/keyple/card/storagecard/CommandUpdateBinary.java#L79) in CommandUpdateBinary fails, because it doesn't do the same checks that [CommandReadBinary' parseResponse](https://github.com/calypsonet-member/keyple-card-cna-storagecard-java-lib/blob/b1149ee0a1fe81feb7dec229118c00b1ff9249ff/src/main/java/org/calypsonet/keyple/card/storagecard/CommandReadBinary.java#L68) function does.

Can we have a fix for that?

Sorry for bothering you all.
